subject: NEW: Trump hat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Get the latest hat in honor of President-elect Trump's inauguration. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba2D7QFDPyCFrWgaS4aDRMN6aaaaCMAzBMEFYFpa?k=~@rHuAu&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=l&n=&1=rAqBrE03h4cz0zhoisTod3YkbIXkj20tVm03030rVIUIr%25A3I%25sLSk&jIj)

Friend,

As one of the most valued President-elect Trump supporters, I want to give you a first look at our latest made-in-America hat released in advance of Inauguration Day.

**Get your Official TRUMP Presidential Cap for $40 by choosing from any one of the three colors below.**
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba2D7QFDPyCFrWgaS4aDRMN6aaaaCMAzBMEFYFpa?k=~@rHuAu&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=o&n=&1=rAqBrE03h4cz0zhoisTod3YkbIXkj20tVm03030rVIUIr%25A3I%25sLSk&jIj) [](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba2D7QFDPyCFrWgaS4aDRMN6aaaaCMAzBMEFYFpa?k=~@rHuAu&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=p&n=&1=rAqBrE03h4cz0zhoisTod3YkbIXkj20tVm03030rVIUIr%25A3I%25sLSk&jIj) [](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba2D7QFDPyCFrWgaS4aDRMN6aaaaCMAzBMEFYFpa?k=~@rHuAu&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=q&n=&1=rAqBrE03h4cz0zhoisTod3YkbIXkj20tVm03030rVIUIr%25A3I%25sLSk&jIj) [](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba2D7QFDPyCFrWgaS4aDRMN6aaaaCMAzBMEFYFpa?k=~@rHuAu&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=m&n=&1=rAqBrE03h4cz0zhoisTod3YkbIXkj20tVm03030rVIUIr%25A3I%25sLSk&jIj)
_Our movement 's new cap shows our call for unity, country, and patriotism during this critical time in our nation's history._

The Trump presidency is about charting a new path forward that puts America FIRST -- and our new Official TRUMP Presidential Cap echoes that message.

[**Get your Official TRUMP Presidential Cap for $40 to show your support for the next president of the United States.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba2D7QFDPyCFrWgaS4aDRMN6aaaaCMAzBMEFYFpa?k=~@rHuAu&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=n&n=&1=rAqBrE03h4cz0zhoisTod3YkbIXkj20tVm03030rVIUIr%25A3I%25sLSk&jIj)

Thank you,

Alex
Trump Store Manager

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
---
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: On the brink of collapse
body:
Here's what we're going to be fighting for Democrats
---
**Democrats are taking the fight to Trump and the GOP, and we need your help. Chip in $3 or more today:

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c385/4067b0a/223d872c3/7e07e46b/909314757/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20161203_ew_nd&source=em_20161203_ew_nd")**
Friend --

What do Wilbur Ross and Steven Mnuchin -- Trump's incoming Secretaries of Commerce and the Treasury -- have in common?

They're both Wall Street billionaires who got rich preying on working Americans and foreclosing on their homes. And once confirmed, they plan to start bringing back the Bush-era economic policies that helped lead us to the worst economic recession since the Great Depression.

Donald Trump has already shown that he plans to use the presidency for his own personal gain, so it's hardly a surprise that's starting to trickle down to his Cabinet.

But if they think we're going to let them take our economy back to the brink of collapse without a fight, they've got another thing coming. Democrats are going to do everything we can to preserve what President Obama has done to keep predatory Wall Street financiers like Ross and Mnuchin in check.

We cannot do that without your help. Chip in $3 or whatever you can today to make sure that we are ready to stand up to Donald Trump and his billionaire buddies.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c385/4067b0a/223d872c3/7e07e468/909314757/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20161203_ew_nd&source=em_20161203_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c385/4067b0a/223d872c3/7e07e469/909314757/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20161203_ew_nd&source=em_20161203_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c385/4067b0a/223d872c3/7e07e476/909314757/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20161203_ew_nd&source=em_20161203_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c385/4067b0a/223d872c3/7e07e477/909314757/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20161203_ew_nd&source=em_20161203_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c385/4067b0a/223d872c3/7e07e474/909314757/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20161203_ew_nd&source=em_20161203_ew_nd")**

**Or donate another amount:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c385/4067b0a/223d872c3/7e07e475/909314757/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+httpsmydemocratsorgHelpDemocratsFightBac&utm_campaign=em_20161203_ew_nd&source=em_20161203_ew_nd")**

** Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c385/4067b0a/223d872c3/7e07e472/909314757/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161203_ew_nd&source=em_20161203_ew_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c385/4067b0a/223d872c3/7e07e473/909314757/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161203_ew_nd&source=em_20161203_ew_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c385/4067b0a/223d872c3/7e07e470/909314757/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161203_ew_nd&source=em_20161203_ew_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c385/4067b0a/223d872c3/7e07e471/909314757/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161203_ew_nd&source=em_20161203_ew_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: Aisling Kerins
subject: re: Now -- more than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Over the next few days -- let's prove what we've got here in Washington. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=OTk4MzQ2OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDI0NTUxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Did you see Governor Inslee's message? The governor is dedicated to protecting our progressive way of life in Washington from "President Trump." A stronger economy for every Washingtonian (including recent immigrants) and a state that is strengthened by its diversity. That's what this is all about. Governor Inslee is also committed to building our movement brick by brick, so we can win in Washington again (and again) and prove our political power ahead of the coming state legislative session. But Governor Inslee can't do it alone. He needs your help before his legally mandated fundraising deadline in six days. Can you chip in to help Governor Inslee build that movement right away? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=OTk4MzQ2OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDI0NTUxNwS2&mt=2&rj=MTA2MDI0NTUxNwS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $25 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=OTk4MzQ2OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDI0NTUxNwS2&mt=2&rj=MTA2MDI0NTUxNwS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $50 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=OTk4MzQ2OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDI0NTUxNwS2&mt=2&rj=MTA2MDI0NTUxNwS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $100 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=OTk4MzQ2OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDI0NTUxNwS2&mt=2&rj=MTA2MDI0NTUxNwS2&rt=0)
---|---
**[Or, donate another amount.](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=OTk4MzQ2OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDI0NTUxNwS2&mt=2&rj=MTA2MDI0NTUxNwS2&rt=0)**
Together, Washington's going to prove what we can do if we're united in a common vision.
Aisling Kerins

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Thursday, Dec 1, 2016
Subject: Now - more than ever

Friend -- You know what? It's time to get to work.
This wasn't the email I thought I'd be writing -- just like these weren't the election results we wanted.
We saw a man who built his campaign on bigotry, racism, and sexism -- on harnessing the fears that divide us -- win this election. **I 've heard from many of you who feel mad. I've heard from many of you who feel scared. And I've heard from many of you committed to being part of the fight for our future.**
**We have a responsibility to act.**
So, here in Washington, we're going to prove that our way beats Trump's way, every time. We're going to prove it with our words, and more importantly we're going to prove it with our actions. We will finish the job of funding our public education system, lead on climate action and give every Washingtonian a path towards economic stability -- even those newest to our country.
We've got a real fight ahead of us, and that makes what we do in Washington state all the more crucial. So with our state's legislative session about to start, I need your help right now to prove our political power.
Together we are going to continue building a progressive movement behind our values -- a movement that will propel our vision of prosperity for all forward day by day, month by month, and year by year.
I'm counting on you to help me do it -- not because we have an election tomorrow, but because building this movement matters for the long term. It matters especially before this legislative session, especially before redistricting and before the next big race.
**At mi dnight on Friday, December 9, we hit a state mandated fundraising freeze. Chip in today to help me raise $20,200 and keep our progressive movement moving forward during the four-month fundraising freeze!**
[**Let 's build the progressive movement we need to stop Trump together -- chip in $5 today before our legally mandated fundraising freeze.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=OTk4MzQ2OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDI0NTUxNwS2&mt=2&rj=MTA2MDI0NTUxNwS2&rt=0)
Now more than ever, places like Washington state must prove that our progressive movement is worth so much more than Donald Trump's hateful politics. We must show we win by bringing people together, by passing progressive policies, and by building stronger, safer communities of our welcoming spirit.
This isn't the result I thought we'd be talking about, but it's where we are now -- so I'm going to keep up the fight. How about you?
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTk4MzQ2OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDI0NTUxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=9983469&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTA2MDI0NTUxNwS2&l=5611360&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible.
---

PO Box 21067
Seattle, WA 98111
